channel.title: vlang/awesome-v Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v May 24th - May 30th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Command line interface (CLI) / Terminal / Shell

  • progressbarstars9 - An easy to use V library for creating progress bars in cli.
  • termtablestars20 - V Terminal Tables: Simple and highly customizable library to display tables in the terminal.
  • vargsstars32 - V library for parsing arguments from argv-like arrays. ( Archived )

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Mar 29th - Apr 4th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

Serialization

  • v-toxmlstars3 - XML Serialization library for V.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Mar 1st - Mar 7th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Web

  • vcurrencystars2 - API wrapper (written in V) for https://api.exchangeratesapi.io.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2021
item.description:
Other

Editor plugins

  • sublime-vstars4 - Fully-featured Sublime Text 3 package for the V Programming Language.

    • Libraries

    Utility

  • vdotenvstars11 - Support for .env files which loads environment variables.

    • Libraries

    Discord

  • viscordstars17 - Pretty basic library for connecting to the Discord gateway.
  • discord.vstars43 - User-friendly Discord bot library.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2021
item.description:
Applications

Command-line

  • vcredits - A tool that creates CREDITS from LICENSE files of dependencies.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Feb 8th - Feb 14th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

Games

  • flappylearning-v - A simple flappy learning demo in v. ( Archived )

    • Libraries

    Web

  • validatestars10 - A simple library to validate strings in V.
  • valvalstars105 - Web framework written in V, improved by vweb.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Feb 1st - Feb 7th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

Command-line

  • vspectstars1 - A tool to inspect vlang source file.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Web

  • vxbloauthstars2 - A minimalistic Xbox Live authenticator for vweb.

    • Other

    Videos

  • V Programming Tutorials
  • The V Programming Language

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Dec 28th - Jan 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Applications

Graphics

  • vRayTracerstars29 - A simple ray tracer written in V.

    • Other

    GitHub actions

  • action-create-v-docs - GitHub action to create documentation for V modules.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Dec 21st - Dec 27th, 2020
item.description:
Other

Editor plugins

  • vim-vtoolsstars6 - V tools for Vim, including auto formatting.

    • Other

    Syntax highlighting

  • vlang-sublimestars16 - Sublime text 3 Support for the Vlang Programming Language.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Nov 30th - Dec 6th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Scientific computing

  • vtlstars26 - Numerical computing library supporting n-dimensional data structure, backed by LAPACKE and OpenBLAS.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Graphics

  • V Earcutstars3 - fast (real-time) polygon triangulation library based on mapbox/Earcutstars1.4k to handle holes, twisted polygons, degeneracies and self-intersections.
  • viupstars19 - V wrapper for the C-based cross-platform UI library, IUP.
  • vsdlstars7 - V wrapper for the C-based SDL library.

    • Libraries

    Game development

  • vraylibstars44 - V wrapper (bindings) for raylib, the C game development framework.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Oct 12th - Oct 18th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Database clients

  • vmemcachedstars5 - Memcached client for V, written in V.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Sep 28th - Oct 4th, 2020
item.description:
Applications

Editors

  • vedstars920 - 1 MB text editor written in V with hardware accelerated text rendering. Compiles in <1s.

    • Applications

    Command-line

  • symlinkerstars3 - A small Linux tool to manage symlinks.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2020
item.description:
Other

Syntax highlighting

  • v-modestars19 - Emacs major mode for the V programming language.
  • vlang-mode.elstars5 - Emacs major mode for the V programming language.

    • Applications

    Serialization

  • vprotostars31 - Protobuf compiler and runtime in V.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Aug 31st - Sep 6th, 2020
item.description:
Applications

Games

  • v-pongstars5 - A classic paddle game brought back to life through the power of V.

    • Libraries

    Web

  • pico.vstars35 - A web server in V based on picoev and picohttpparser.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Aug 24th - Aug 30th, 2020
item.description:
Applications

Web

  • vblogstars4 - A simple, fast and responsive blogging system.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Jun 29th - Jul 5th, 2020
item.description:
Applications

Command-line

  • runnerstars7 - A tool that automates running/compiling code written in various programming languages.

    • Libraries

    Database clients

  • vsqlstars25 - A sql query builder for V.

    • Libraries

    IRC

  • vitricstars1 - A transparent IRC library.

    • Other

    Online IDEs with V

  • V Playground

    • Other

    Programming contests

  • SoloLearn Coding Challengesstars6 - Implementation of the SoloLearn coding challenges in V.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Jun 15th - Jun 21st, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Text processing

  • ascii_robotstars8 - ASCII Robot generator written in V.

    • Libraries

    Utility

  • randomstars10 - An all purpose random library written in V.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Jun 8th - Jun 14th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Telegram

  • vgramstars79 - Telegram bot library.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v May 25th - May 31st, 2020
item.description:
Other

Syntax highlighting

  • v-vimstars111 - Support for V syntax highlighting in Vim.
  • vim-vstars9 - Quality syntax highlighting for the V programming language.
  • vscode-vlangstars199 - V Language extension for Visual Studio Code.
  • kate-syntax-highlight-vstars8 - V syntax highlighting for Kate.
  • scite-v-supportstars0 - V syntax highlighting for SciTE.
  • language-vstars3 - V language support for Atom (port of vscode-vlang).

    • Libraries

    Utility

  • rangestars18 - Functionality of Python's range() in V.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v May 11th - May 17th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Operating system

  • vlipboardstars6 - An easy to use wrapper of clipboard with Wayland and Termux support.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v May 4th - May 10th, 2020
item.description:
Other

GitHub actions

  • setup-v-action - GitHub action automation to use V in your workflow.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Mar 9th - Mar 15th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Text processing

  • cjsonstars4 - Wrap cJSON for vlang.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Mar 2nd - Mar 8th, 2020
item.description:
Applications

Command-line

  • vaststars20 - A simple tool for vlang, generate v source file to AST json file.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Feb 24th - Mar 1st, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Command line interface (CLI) / Terminal / Shell

  • lolstars10 - V version of lolcat (text/character rainbowizer).

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Feb 17th - Feb 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Database clients

  • redisstars28 - Redis client for V, written in V.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Feb 10th - Feb 16th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Scientific computing

  • vslstars120 - A pure-V scientific library with a great variety of functions.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Jan 20th - Jan 26th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

User Interface toolkits

  • vgtk3stars41 - A wrapper for GTK3 in V.

    • Libraries

    Text processing

  • crayonstars25 - Paint your terminal output like Picasso. 🖍️🎨

    • Libraries

    Audio

  • vavestars25 - A crazy simple library for reading/writing WAV files in V. 🌊
  • vspeechstars30 - Complete V bindings for Mozilla's DeepSpeech TensorFlow based Speech-to-Text library. 📢📜

    • Other

    Programming contests

  • Rosetta Code Vstars22 - Solutions for Rosetta Code in V.
  • Advent of Code 2019stars10 - Solution of Advent of Code 2019 in V.

    • Other

    Tutorials

  • V by Examplestars131 - V book as GitBook.

item.title: vlang/awesome-v Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
Applications

Interpreters/Compilers

  • vstars23.7k - V itself. Simple, fast, safe, compiled language for developing maintainable software.
  • vbfstars14 - A brainfuck interpreter/compiler.
  • monkey_vstars30 - Implementation of Thorsten Ball's Monkey Language in V.
  • vccstars59 - A C compiler written in V.
  • Vorkstars19 - Alternative V compiler/interpreter written in Python.

    • Applications

    Package managers

  • vpmstars24 - The V language package management tool written in V.

    • Applications

    Web

  • vorumstars155 - Open-source blogging/forum software written in V.
  • Heroku Buildpack for Vstars13 - Deploy V apps on Heroku.

    • Applications

    Games

  • Boundstonestars35 - High Performance / Fast Compilation / Lightweight Minecraft: Bedrock Edition Server.

    • Applications

    Command-line

  • HN-topstars17 - A simple command to list most recent news from hacker-news.

    • Applications

    Project management

  • vsetstars13 - A project setup and configuration tool for V projects.

    • Libraries

    Command line interface (CLI) / Terminal / Shell

  • boxxstars62 - Create highly customizable terminal boxes that also look great! 📦

    • Libraries

    Text processing

  • v-regexstars10 - A simple regex library for V.
  • chalkstars9 - Colorize strings in the terminal.

    • Libraries

    Graphics

  • vglstars16 - Low-level graphics API access.
  • vsdl2stars27 - A libSDL2 wrapper.

    • Libraries

    Web

  • vexstars150 - Web framework written on V inspired by Express and Sinatra.
  • vweb - V's built-in web framework. Used by Vorum.
  • v-jsonrpcstars25 - Basic JSON-RPC 2.0-compliant server written on V.

    • Libraries

    Audio

  • v-miniaudiostars14 - Bindings for the excellent miniaudio C audio library.

    • Libraries

    Operating system

  • clipboard - V module for interacting with the OS clipboard. Fully cross-platform.

    • Libraries

    Automation

  • vrobotstars17 - Desktop automation for V. Only supports Windows.

    • Libraries

    Files

  • v-mimestars16 - MIME detection library for V.

    • Libraries

    Eventing

  • eventbus - A simple event bus system for V.

    • Libraries

    User Interface toolkits

  • V UIstars1.3k - Integrated cross platform UI toolkit for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS and the web.
  • vigstars18 - Bindings for Dear ImGuistars29.4k GUI toolkit.
  • vnkstars28 - Bindings for Nuklearstars13.3k GUI toolkit.

    • Other

    Tutorials

  • Learn V in Y Minutesstars42
  • V learning notesstars57 - Personal learning notes in Chinese.

    • Other

    Articles

  • An introduction to V
  • The Book of Vstars23

    • Other

    Communities

  • V Community

    • Other

    Forums

  • r/vlang
  • Stack Overflow
